title: sophora flavescens f. angustifolia
intro: Sophora flavescens f. angustifolia, also known as Guan Mu Tong or Chinese Milk Vetch, is a flowering plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of certain respiratory conditions. Guan Mu Tong is commonly prepared in herbal tea or dried root form, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
